notes: commitAll remains as the central invalidation helper inside js/infra/api.js; normal mutation paths now finalize through finalizeMutation().
calendar.js still contains direct render() only for compatibility fallback and init path, not for nav/view/date/sort handlers.
ui/events.js now renders active tab through UI_SHELL coordinator renderer.
stateIO.applySnapshot/resetDataKeepUI now finalize through explicit finalizeOnce() helper.
